message:
fix(math): correct JS_TAG_FLOAT64 value in native math polyfill

The math polyfill incorrectly used tag value 7 for FLOAT64, but in
QuickJS-ng:
- Tag 7 = JS_TAG_SHORT_BIG_INT (small BigInt)
- Tag 8 = JS_TAG_FLOAT64 (actual float)

This caused Math.max/min and other math functions to return BigInt
values instead of regular numbers on native (non-WASM) builds,
breaking TypeScript compilation.
